caption: A man with a short beard and shaved head is recording in a studio with dark gray acoustic foam paneling in the background. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that says "Stay Focused". He is positioned behind a professional condenser microphone mounted on a shock mount and boom arm. Across the sequence, the man speaks into the microphone, his facial expression shifting slightly as he talks. In the final frame, he raises his left hand in a blurred motion, gesturing as he continues to speak. He remains in the same position throughout, with the lighting and setting remaining constant as he focuses his attention forward and slightly to the side.
